channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Rafael Nadal's legacy is a relentlessness that inspired Carlos Alcaraz and plenty of others
item.description: MALAGA, Spain (AP) — Not surprisingly, Rafael Nadal couldn’t take a step around the grounds of the Davis Cup Final 8 in recent days without hearing requests for a handshake or a selfie. And that was just from the other professional tennis players, to speak nothing of the fans.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Capitals put Alex Ovechkin on injured reserve, ruling him out at least a week
item.description: The Washington Capitals put Alex Ovechkin on injured reserve and recalled fellow Russian winger Ivan Miroshnichenko from the minors.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Whyno, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Lakers' Dalton Knecht ties NBA rookie record for 3-pointers in a game
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Dalton Knecht could only shrug when he buried his fourth consecutive 3-pointer and sent the Los Angeles Lakers ' entire arena into a frenzy.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Florida State is losing recruits at nearly the same pace that it's losing games in 2024
item.description: TALLAHASSEE, Fla. (AP) — Coach Mike Norvell spent years slowly rebuilding at Florida State and then suddenly turned the Seminoles into a championship contender last season.
item.dc:creator: BOB FERRANTE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Diego Legion to play in new stadium next year
item.description: Snapdragon Stadium will no longer be the home for the San Diego Legion as the professional rugby team will be heading back to Torero Stadium at the University of San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: No. 1 Kansas overcomes sluggish start, beats UNC Wilmington 84-66 to give Bill Self 800th career win
item.description: LAWRENCE, Kan. (AP) — Hunter Dickinson had 15 points and 15 rebounds, Dajuan Harris Jr. scored 16 points, and No. 1 Kansas shrugged off a sluggish start to beat UNC Wilmington 84-66 on Tuesday night and give Jayhawks coach Bill Self his 800th career win.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The Jets are a dumpster fire
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- The Jets are a remarkable dumpster fire. Head coach Robert Saleh fired. GM Joe Douglas fired. Offensive coordinator Nathaniel Hackett demoted. They are a 3 and 8 football team and will most certainly miss the playoffs for the 14th consecutive year.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Surprise team slides into automatic bye territory in latest College Football Playoff rankings
item.description: The Boise State Broncos have slid into an automatic bye in the latest College Football Playoff bracket projection, and Colorado still controls its own destiny.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Oklahoma coach Brent Venables keeping 'great faith' amid wife Julie's latest cancer diagnosis
item.description: Oklahoma football coach Brent Venables took a few moments during his show to share details about his wife Julie's latest fight with cancer.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lynne Roberts leaves Utah for WNBA job
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In a shocking announcement Tuesday evening, Lynne Roberts is leaving the University of Utah women's basketball program to become the head coach of the Los Angeles Sparks of the WNBA.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Los Angeles Sparks hire University of Utah coach Lynne Roberts to fill vacant head coach position
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles Sparks have hired Utah coach Lynne Roberts to fill their vacant head coach position, the franchise announced Tuesday night. Roberts has spent the last nine-plus seasons at Utah and led the team to three straight NCAA Tournament berths.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: An emotional Rafael Nadal retires at the Davis Cup after he loses and Spain is eliminated
item.description: Rafael Nadal has lost 6-4, 6-4 to Botic van de Zandschulp of the Netherlands in the Davis Cup quarterfinals in what will be the last match of the 22-time Grand Slam champion’s career.
item.dc:creator: Howard Fendrich, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Ticket renewals begin for 2025 Firestone Grand Prix of St. Petersburg
item.description: Fans who purchased 3-Day grandstand tickets in 2024 can now renew their tickets for the Firestone Grand Prix of St. Petersburg.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Ovechkin scores twice as Washington beats Utah, 6-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - One of the joys of having an NHL team is to watch the game's greatest players come to Salt Lake City. On Monday, the great Alex Ovechkin put on a show for the Utah Hockey Club fans.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Report: Chicago White Sox sign free agent veteran outfielder
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have agreed to a deal with veteran outfielder Austin Slater, who will provide roster depth and familiarity with new director of hitting Ryan Fuller.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Another Lakers legend to receive statue outside arena
item.description: One of the winningest coaches in NBA history will forever be enshrined in downtown Los Angeles when the Lakers unveil the newest statue on Star Plaza outside Crypto.com Arena.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: First images of new Ryan Field released: See photos
item.description: EVANSTON, Ill. — Northwestern University and the family that's supported the majority of the funding and planning for the new Ryan Field are billing it as a "sports and entertainment venue set to become a landmark for college football and Chicago." Now, the public can get its first look.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Beyoncé performing at halftime of NFL Christmas Day game on Netflix
item.description: Beyoncé is coming to your home on Christmas — provided you have Netflix and are tuning in to the Baltimore Ravens-Houston Texans game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: James Harden breaks tie with Ray Allen, moves to No. 2 on NBA's career 3-point list
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — James Harden now stands alone at No. 2 in 3-pointers. The Los Angeles Clippers guard connected on the 2,974th 3-pointer of his career Sunday night and broke a tie with Basketball Hall of Famer Ray Allen for the No. 2 spot on the NBA’s list.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Triathlete with terminal cancer completes Ironman championship
item.description: An Ironman is a test of endurance featuring a 2.4-mile swim, a 26.2-mile marathon run, and a 112-mile bike ride.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Bears show moxie against Packers, fall short for 4th straight week as Santos FG is blocked as time expires
item.description: The Chicago Bears lost to the Green Bay Packers 20-19, setting a new record for the longest win streak in the historic rivalry, breaking a tie with a 10-game win streak from 1994 to 1998.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Trump attends UFC championship fight in New York, taking break from Cabinet picks
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump walked out to a roaring standing ovation just ahead of the start of the UFC pay-per-view card at Madison Square Garden on Saturday night, combining two things close to his heart: fierce battles inside the octagon and New York City.
item.dc:creator: Will Weissert, WFLA, NBC

item.title: CMU Football looks to keep their playoff hopes alive
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—After a six-game winning streak, the Colorado Mesa University Mavericks rolled into Rapid City with momentum, only to have their playoff hopes stalled by South Dakota Mines in a gritty 17-14 defeat.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: CMU drops final game at home against Western Colorado
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—After a six-game winning streak, Colorado Mesa University was dealt a setback by South Dakota Mines. Now, the Mavericks return to their home field with the stakes as high as the Rocky Mountains, aiming to secure a playoff spot.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Utah State crushes Hawaii, 55-10
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Rahsul Faison rushed for 192 yards and two touchdowns, as the Utah State football team cruised past Hawaii Saturday at Maverik Stadium, 55-10.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: PREVIEW: GJ Tigers football in round 2 of the playoffs vs. Ponderosa
item.description: For the first time since 2011, it is mid-November and the Grand Junction Tigers are still practicing football.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: No. 13 Purdue rediscovers strong post presence in 87-78 win over No. 2 Alabama
item.description: Boilermakers forward Trey Kaufman-Renn made 12 of 23 shots, scored a career-high 26 points and grabbed eight rebounds as No. 13 Purdue handed No. 2 Alabama an 87-78 defeat that was eerily reminiscent of last season's 92-86 loss to the Boilermakers in Toronto.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: VIDEO: Mike Tyson slapped Jake Paul at their final weigh-in. Here's why Tyson claims he did it
item.description: A meeting between Mike Tyson and Jake Paul briefly devolved into chaos on Thursday after Tyson slapped Paul across the face during the final weigh-in before their highly anticipated fight on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, WGN 9

item.title: Girls Volleyball: Cathedral 3, Los Alamitos 0
item.description: The Lady Dons take on the Griffins of Los Alamitos in the first round of the 2024 CIF Open Division Championships.
item.dc:creator: Joaquin Duncan, Fox 5

item.title: Jazz beat Dallas for first home victory, 115-113
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was finally home sweet home for the Utah Jazz. John Collins scored the last of his 28 points on a tiebreaking dunk with 6.4 seconds left to give the Utah Jazz their first home victory of the season, 115-113 over the Dallas Mavericks on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lone Peak holds off Skyridge in 6A semifinal, 28-21
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Lone Peak Knights avenged a loss earlier in the season to Skyridge, and are headed back to the 6A championship game.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Curry upset after Klay 'ghosted' him before game, Draymond Green says
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- While it seemed to be all sunshine and roses inside Chase Center as the packed arena welcomed back Klay Thompson on Tuesday, that wasn't exactly the case -- at least amongst the players on the court.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Olympic champion Lindsey Vonn is ending her retirement at age 40 to make a skiing comeback
item.description: Vonn's last competition came in February 2019, after she dealt with a long series of injuries throughout her career.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Vejmelka makes 49 saves as Utah beats Carolina, 4-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club needed a victory in the worst way, and backup goalie Karel Vejmelka made sure they got one. Vejmelka made a career-high 49 saves, as Utah killed off over ten minutes of power plays in route to a 4-1 victory over the Carolina Hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
